report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: Ethereum Layer 2 Ecosystem Guide (Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, ZK rollups comparison) and Concentrated Liquidity & LP Strategies Guide (Uniswap v4, CLAMM protocols, LP playbook).

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Ethereum L2 Ecosystem: Base (46.58%) and Arbitrum (30.86%) dominate 77% of L2 TVL; Arbitrum leads at $18B TVL; Base leads retail transaction volume; Optimism anchors Superchain ecosystem at $6B TVL; zkSync Era at $6.5B with native account abstraction; smaller L2s risk becoming zombie chains by 2026

Concentrated Liquidity: Uniswap v4 launched Jan 2025, hit $100B+ cumulative volume and $1B TVL in 177 days; Hooks enable 2,500+ custom pools; Trader Joe Liquidity Book uses Surge Pricing to compensate IL; Maverick offers directional liquidity and auto-repositioning; well-managed CL positions earn 20-100% APR on volatile pairs; static ranges are obsolete in 2026

sections.title: Content Created
items: Ethereum Layer 2 Ecosystem Guide 2026 (856 lines) — 10 sections covering L2 types, Big Three comparison, ZK contenders, choosing guide, bridging, token ecosystem, risks, getting started, FAQ

Concentrated Liquidity & LP Strategies Guide 2026 (819 lines) — 10 sections covering CL mechanics, Uniswap v4 innovations, alternative CLAMMs, LP strategy playbook, impermanent loss deep dive, advanced 2026 strategies, tools & analytics, risk management, FAQ

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: L2 Guide — Title: 'Ethereum Layer 2 Guide 2026: Base, Arbitrum, Optimism & Beyond | degen0x' | Target keywords: ethereum layer 2, best L2 networks, L2 comparison 2026 | Schemas: Article + FAQPage (6 FAQs)

CL Guide — Title: 'Concentrated Liquidity Guide 2026: LP Strategies for Uniswap v4 & Beyond | degen0x' | Target keywords: concentrated liquidity, LP strategies DeFi, Uniswap v4 liquidity | Schemas: Article + FAQPage (6 FAQs)
Both pages include OpenGraph article metadata, Twitter cards, structured data JSON-LD, internal links to 4+ related degen0x guides each, breadcrumb navigation, and comparison tables
